patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -1,16 +1,17 @@
-/* Watchdog Timer HAL - wdt_hal.h */
+/* Watchdog Timer HAL - wdt_hal.h (BREAKING: enum values shifted, new entry added) */
 #ifndef WDT_HAL_H
 #define WDT_HAL_H
 
 #include <stdint.h>
 
 typedef enum {
-    WDT_TIMEOUT_256MS  = 0,
-    WDT_TIMEOUT_512MS  = 1,
-    WDT_TIMEOUT_1S     = 2,
-    WDT_TIMEOUT_2S     = 3,
-    WDT_TIMEOUT_4S     = 4,
-    WDT_TIMEOUT_8S     = 5
+    WDT_TIMEOUT_128MS  = 0,   /* BREAKING: new entry inserted at beginning */
+    WDT_TIMEOUT_256MS  = 1,   /* was 0 */
+    WDT_TIMEOUT_512MS  = 2,   /* was 1 */
+    WDT_TIMEOUT_1S     = 3,   /* was 2 */
+    WDT_TIMEOUT_2S     = 4,   /* was 3 */
+    WDT_TIMEOUT_4S     = 5,   /* was 4 */
+    WDT_TIMEOUT_8S     = 6    /* was 5 */
 } WDT_Timeout_t;
 
 typedef enum {
